name: agent-booster-pack-technical-design
description: ABP Pi technical-design guard plus technical-design skill: one user-facing question at a time.

scripts.install-ext: npm run build && mkdir -p ~/.pi/agent/extensions && ln -sfn "$(pwd)" ~/.pi/agent/extensions/agent-booster-pack-technical-design && echo 'Installed to ~/.pi/agent/extensions/agent-booster-pack-technical-design -- run /reload in Pi to activate'

author: Alastair Dawson
